title: CS50x: Introduction to Computer Science
description: A broad introduction to computer science fundamentals, from computational thinking and algorithms to web and software development through project-based learning.
skillsLearned: C, Python, SQL, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS

title: CS50P: Introduction to Programming with Python
description: A Python-focused course covering core programming concepts and practical software construction with strong emphasis on clean code and testing.

title: CS50AI: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Python
description: An applied introduction to AI methods using Python, including search, optimization, probabilistic reasoning, machine learning, and neural networks.
